languages.text: "Проктор-взыскатель Соломон Антар, {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusArbitesGlossary}Адептус Арбитес{/g}. Назовите свое имя и цель пребывания на Райкаде Минорис". {n}Его голос звучит спокойно и ровно, но дробовик чуть упирается в плечо — позиция, из которой легко вскинуть оружие и начать стрельбу.{/n}

"Proctor-Exactant Solomorne Anthar of the Adeptus Arbites. State your name and the purpose of your stay on Rykad Minoris." {n}Although his voice sounds even and calm, his shotgun is pressed into his shoulder — a position from which one might easily raise one's weapon and open fire.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Проктор Соломон Антар, Адептус Арбитес. Назовите свое имя и цель пребывания на Райкаде Минорис". {n}Его голос звучит спокойно и ровно, но дробовик чуть упирается в плечо — позиция, из которой легко вскинуть оружие и начать стрельбу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Proctor Solomorne Anthar of the Adeptus Arbites. State your name and purpose of stay on Rykad Minoris." {n}Although his voice sounds even and calm, his shotgun is pressed into his shoulder — a position that makes it easy to raise one's weapon and open fire.{/n}

"Proctor Solomorne Anthar of the Adeptus Arbites. State your name and purpose of stay on Rykad Minoris." {n}Although his voice sounds even and calm, his shotgun is pressed into his shoulder — a position that makes it easy to raise one's weapon and open fire.{/n}

"Proctor-Exactant Solomorne Anthar of the Adeptus Arbites. State your name and the purpose of your stay on Rykad Minoris." {n}Although his voice sounds even and calm, his shotgun is pressed into his shoulder — a position from which one might easily raise one's weapon and open fire.{/n}

languages.text: "Proktor-Exaktant Solomorne Anthar von den Adeptus Arbites. Nennt Euren Namen und den Grund Eures Aufenthaltes auf Rykad Minoris." {n}Obwohl seine Stimme ruhig klingt, presst er den Kolben seiner Schrotflinte an seine Schulter ... was dich durchaus dazu verleiten könnte, das Feuer zu eröffnen.{/n}

State your name and the purpose of your stay on Rykad Minoris." {n}Although his voice sounds even and calm, his shotgun is pressed into his shoulder — a position from which one might easily raise one's weapon and open fire.{/n}

"Proktor Solomorne Anthar vom Adeptus Arbites. Nennt Euren Namen und den Grund Eures Aufenthaltes auf Rykad Minoris." {n}Obwohl seine Stimme ruhig klingt, presst er den Kolben seiner Schrotflinte an seine Schulter ... was dich durchaus dazu verleiten könnte, das Feuer zu eröffnen.{/n}

languages.text: « Proctor-exactant Solomorne Anthar de l'Adeptus Arbites. Déclinez votre identité et la raison de votre présence sur Rykad Minoris. » {n}Bien que sa voix semble calme, son fusil à pompe est calé contre son épaule, une position dans laquelle il n'aurait aucun mal à lever son arme pour ouvrir le feu.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Proctor-Exactant Solomorne Anthar of the Adeptus Arbites. State your name and the purpose of your stay on Rykad Minoris." {n}Although his voice sounds even and calm, his shotgun is pressed into his shoulder — a position from which one might easily raise one's weapon and open fire.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Proctor-exactant Solomorne Anthar de l'Adeptus Arbites. Déclinez votre identité et la raison de votre présence sur Rykad Minoris. » {n}Bien que sa voix semble calme, son fusil à pompe est calé contre son épaule, une position dans laquelle il n'aurait aucun mal à lever son arme pour ouvrir le feu.{/n}

languages.text: «Procurador-Exactor Solomorne Anthar, del Adeptus Arbites. Diga su nombre y el motivo de su presencia en Rykad Minoris». {n}Aunque el tono de su voz es sereno y neutral, la culata de su escopeta está firmemente apoyada contra su hombro, una postura desde la cual no le costaría nada levantar el arma y abrir fuego.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Proctor-Exactant Solomorne Anthar of the Adeptus Arbites. State your name and the purpose of your stay on Rykad Minoris." {n}Although his voice sounds even and calm, his shotgun is pressed into his shoulder — a position from which one might easily raise one's weapon and open fire.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Procurador-Exactor Solomorne Anthar, del Adeptus Arbites. Diga su nombre y el motivo de su presencia en Rykad Minoris». {n}Aunque el tono de su voz es sereno y neutral, la culata de su escopeta está firmemente apoyada contra su hombro, una postura desde la cual no le costaría nada levantar el arma y abrir fuego.{/n}

languages.text: “这里是帝国法务部，索罗蒙·安萨督审监察官。请说出你的名字，阐明你在小莱卡德逗留的目的。”{n}尽管他的声音听起来非常平静，没有一丝感情，但他手中的霰弹枪却紧紧压在肩膀上。这个姿势可以迅速举枪开火。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Proctor-Exactant Solomorne Anthar of the Adeptus Arbites. State your name and the purpose of your stay on Rykad Minoris." {n}Although his voice sounds even and calm, his shotgun is pressed into his shoulder — a position from which one might easily raise one's weapon and open fire.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “这里是帝国法务部，索罗蒙·安萨督审监察官。请说出你的名字，阐明你在小莱卡德逗留的目的。”{n}尽管他的声音听起来非常平静，没有一丝感情，但他手中的霰弹枪却紧紧压在肩膀上。这个姿势可以迅速举枪开火。{/n}

languages.text: 「高等裁定局所属、エクザタント代理人ソロモーン・アンサールです。あなたの名前と、このライカド・ミノリスに滞在する理由を言ってください」{n}声こそ平静で落ち着いているものの、彼の肩にはショットガンが構えられていて、そこからいつでも銃を上げて発砲できる体勢だった。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Proctor-Exactant Solomorne Anthar of the Adeptus Arbites. State your name and the purpose of your stay on Rykad Minoris." {n}Although his voice sounds even and calm, his shotgun is pressed into his shoulder — a position from which one might easily raise one's weapon and open fire.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「高等裁定局所属、代理人ソロモーン・アンサールです。あなたの名前と、このライカド・ミノリスに滞在する理由を言ってください」{n}声こそ平静で落ち着いているものの、彼の肩にはショットガンが構えられていて、そこからいつでも銃を上げて発砲できる体勢だった。{/n}

languages.text: "Ben Adeptus Arbites'ten Zaptçı Üsteğmen Solomorne Anthar. İsminizi ve Rykad Minoris'te bulunma amacınızı derhâl beyan edin." {n}Duygusuz ve sakin bir sesle konuşuyor olmasına rağmen pompalısını omzuna dayalı tutuyor. Silahını anında kaldırıp ateş açmakta zorlanmayacağı belli.{/n}

Silahını anında kaldırıp ateş açmakta zorlanmayacağı belli.{/n}
